g.text: Bank Application - Class Diagram (Annotated for Interview)
Trace: "Customer opens account, deposits money, transfers to another account, transaction logged, notifications sent."
KYC status. Must be VERIFIED before
returns a SavingsAccount with correct rules.
Add RecurringDeposit? One new class + one
TransferCommand: withdraw from A + deposit to B
"All must pass. Add KYCValidator? One class.
Change Savings to Tiered? Swap one mapping."
No if-else in Account. Each state
Facade, Factory, Command, Strategy (x3), State, Observer
Customer with KYC, address, multiple accounts
Each operation is a Command: execute(), undo(), validate()
Validators: balance, daily limit, fraud, account status
Interest: simple / compound / tiered per account type
Transaction alert, low balance, fraud alert, audit log
